name: latoo-scripts
description: Company npm script runner with tabbed workspace UI, favorites, and drag-to-reorder

latooScripts.description: All Latoo Scripts configuration. Properties are shallow-merged across settings scopes (Global > Workspace > Folder), so you can set shared defaults globally and override specific properties per workspace.

primaryClickTarget.description: Controls script row primary click. 'internal' runs in internal terminal, 'external' runs via external command template.

externalRunCommandTemplate.description: Shell command template for 'Run in external window'. Placeholders: {workspacePath}, {scriptName}, {packageManager}, {runCommand}, {envName}, plus *Escaped and *Uri variants.

internalRunMode.description: 'dedicated' reuses one terminal for all runs; 'perScript' creates/reuses a terminal per workspace and script.

internalRunLocation.description: Primary internal run location. 'panel' = terminal panel, 'editor' = terminal editor area.

internalRunPreserveFocus.description: When true, running a script does not steal focus from the editor.

internalRunOpenNewWhenBusy.description: When true, if terminal is busy, a new overflow terminal is created. Requires VS Code 1.93+.

internalRunLocationOverrides.description: Per-script location overrides. Key: '<workspacePath>::<scriptName>'. Value: 'panel' or 'editor'.

internalRunAlwaysNewOverrides.description: Per-script override for always opening a new terminal. Key: '<workspacePath>::<scriptName>'. Value: true/false.

internalRunIncludeScripts.description: Scripts that use internal run behavior settings. Supports * wildcards and '<workspacePath>::<script>' patterns.

internalRunExcludeScripts.description: Scripts excluded from internal run behavior. Exclude overrides include.

envNameDefault.description: Default envName value used by script runs and external command templates.

envNameUseWorkspaceFolderName.description: When enabled, envName follows workspace folder name for git worktree folders.

envNameEnabled.description: Shows envName hint in the Latoo Scripts view header.

envNameIncludeScripts.description: Scripts that receive automatic envName injection. Default ['*'] applies to all.

envNameExcludeScripts.description: Scripts excluded from envName injection. Exclude overrides include.

persistentTerminalOverrides.description: Per-script terminal style overrides. Key: '<workspacePath>::<scriptName>'. Value: { name, color }.

persistentTerminalDefaultColors.description: Color palette for auto-picking per-script terminal colors.

persistentTerminalIncludeScripts.description: Scripts that use persistent terminal naming/color. Default ['*'].

persistentTerminalExcludeScripts.description: Scripts excluded from persistent terminal behavior.

showOpenScript.description: Show 'Open script in package.json' action button.

showRunExternal.description: Show 'Run in external window' action button.

showOpenExternalTabCopyCommand.description: Show 'Open external tab and copy command' action button.

customFavoriteCommandsEnabled.description: Show custom favorite command entries in Favorites tab.

customFavoriteCommands.description: Custom favorite commands (VS Code settings override). Merged with shared project commands — settings entries win on name conflict.

scripts.reinstall:cursor: pnpm run package && pnpm run install:cursor
